mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM erp_member m
AND (m.name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR m.phone LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')

SELECT m.member_id, m.name, m.gender, m.birth_date, m.phone, m.email, m.address, m.district_id, d.district_name, m.join_date, m.member_type, m.status, m.reg_date FROM erp_member m LEFT JOIN erp_district d ON m.district_id = d.district_id WHERE m.member_type = 'NEWCOMER' AND (m.name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR m.phone LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%') ORDER BY m.reg_date DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM erp_member WHERE member_type = 'NEWCOMER' AND (name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR phone LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM erp_district
AND district_name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM erp_member_change c LEFT JOIN erp_member m ON c.member_id = m.member_id
AND m.name LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
